boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate telemetry service after prerequisite calibration evidence is attached to the activation packet?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match on device group, site, and release condition between calibration and activation.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-ACR-022-P mandates exact matches for device group, site, and release condition.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: STD-ACR-022-P requires an exact match on device group, site, and release condition for activation dependencies.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Calibration evidence (CAL-ACR-022) for DG-41B lab units at Site 18-L does not precisely match the activation target (DG-41B production units at Site 18-P).

final_answer: The action may not proceed. Calibration evidence CAL-ACR-022 covers lab units at Site 18-L, while the activation targets production units at Site 18-P. STD-ACR-022-P requires an exact match on device group, site, and release condition, which is not met due to the lab/production and site discrepancies. The source boundary remains open, necessitating escalation for resolution.
open_blockers: device group mismatch: lab vs production
